2025567115982606549.full_text:
Axar’s Unfair "Internal Competition"
Axar seems to be a victim of being "too similar" to Ravindra Jadeja in the past, and now he's being rotated out to accommodate Sundar’s off-spin for the sake of "variety." But variety shouldn't trump quality. Based on recent ICC Player Rankings and match impact, Axar currently offers a higher ceiling with both bat and ball than Washington.
